creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On recent ports tree (r332163) and CURRENT10/11, I receive error message shown below when recompiling graphics/GL and graphics/GLU:

[...]
install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usr/ports/graphics/libGL/work/Mesa-9.1.6/src/glx/.libs/libGL.so /usr/local/lib/.libGL/
install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usr/ports/graphics/libGL/work/Mesa-9.1.6/src/glx/.libs/libGL.so.1 /usr/local/lib/.libGL/
===>   Running ldconfig
/sbin/ldconfig -m /usr/local/lib
#!/bin/sh
#
# $FreeBSD$
#

PREFIX="${PKG_PREFIX-/usr/local}"

case $2 in
POST-INSTALL)
        if [ -f ${PREFIX}/lib/.nvidia/libGL.so.1 ]; then
          /bin/ln -f ${PREFIX}/lib/.nvidia/libGL.so.1 ${PREFIX}/lib/libGL.so
          /bin/ln -f ${PREFIX}/lib/.nvidia/libGL.so.1 ${PREFIX}/lib/libGL.so.1
        else
          /bin/ln -f ${PREFIX}/lib/.libGL/libGL.so.1 ${PREFIX}/lib/libGL.so
          /bin/ln -f ${PREFIX}/lib/.libGL/libGL.so.1 ${PREFIX}/lib/libGL.so.1
        fi
        ;;
esac
cat: /usr/ports/graphics/libGL/work/.metadir/+INSTALL: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/libGL

===>>> Installation of libGL-9.1.6 (graphics/libGL) failed
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Update for graphics/libGL failed
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Update for graphics/libGLU failed
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Killing background jobs
Terminated
===>>> The following actions were performed:
        Re-installation of dri2proto-2.8


===>>> You can restart from the point of failure with this command line:
       portmaster <flags> graphics/libGLU graphics/libGL


It seems, the mentione file isn't present and following the instruction in section solving makes the ports installable, again.

Fix: 

touch /usr/ports/graphics/libGL/work/.metadir/+INSTALL
portmaster -C graphics/GL graphics/GLU
